metadata.seed: My boss recently left the company and I am not getting the information from her boss that I need. It is worrisome.

patient.query: Um, I guess it comes up a lot during interviews or even just when I’m updating my resume. It’s like the moment I sit down to say what I’ve accomplished, that voice just jumps in and makes me second guess everything. And sometimes, even just seeing others succeed in their careers makes it worse. I start thinking, “Why isn’t that me?” It feels like I’m stuck on the sidelines while everyone else is moving forward.

automatic_thoughts: I second guess everything
Why isn't that me?
I'm stuck on the sidelines

Fear of being a burden to others (finding)
